minigame.template.title: Template Mini-game
minigame.cartCarry.prompt: Left stick/WASD moves the back carrier · right stick/arrows the front
minigame.dance.prompt: Press A to start — hit the arrows on the beat
minigame.jumpQuest.prompt: Reach the top! ←→ move · A jumps
minigame.jumpRope.prompt: Press A to start — B runs a member in, A jumps. 10 in a row!
minigame.jumpRope.enterHint: When the B cue appears, press B to run in — before it drains!
minigame.jumpRope.jumpHint: When the A cue appears, press A to jump — 10 in a row!
minigame.boneHeist.prompt: Drag the bones aside and sneak the balls to the basket — move slowly, the dog wakes if you get too loud!
minigame.timeToShine.prompt: Press A to start — watch the host's poses, then repeat them on the beat!
